config.kitTxRx: Wisycom MCR54, MTP61 x4, MTP41 x4

1.description:
The image is black. The melody of a child's humming sounds, the voice of a little girl. In the background, you can hear
bees in the air, leaves rustling in the wind, and birds chirping.

2.notes: Once again, mostly sound design - done in post.
2.description:
The children's buzzing continues. A beehive stands in a green meadow; far and wide there is nothing to see
except wild grass and a few trees.
Warm rays of sunlight fall upon the opening of the beehive. Slowly, a bee appears inside and flies out. A buzzing sound follows it through the morning air. 
A second bee follows. The bees begin to dance around each other as more and more of them... They join in.
The children's humming slowly fades into the buzzing of the bees. The commotion of the insects
grows ever more lively. The buzzing of the individual bees merges into a unified melody.

3.description:
Two women run in slow motion into the anteroom of a Women's restrooms. Posters and stickers adorn the walls. The woman in front, Mai, practically charges forward.
She pulls her friend Elin along by the hand, talking at her. Elin lets herself be swept away by Mai. Elin's body seems much more sluggish than Mai's; her center of gravity is slightly shifted backward to slow Mai down. She's wearing an oversized denim jacket and holding a beer in her free hand. The sounds of the beehive can still be heard; Mai's voice, talking to Elin, is only faintly discernible.
Mai beams with a smile, her face framed by her afro.
She is wearing a purple glittery top that draws attention to her and a short skirt.

We see a woman with a severe short haircut, wearing a shirt and tie, repeatedly stretching her mouthwide as if she were making a "ks" sound. Another woman, with mottled pink hair and an oversized band t-
shirt, is lip-syncing. The sounds they both make are muffled. Still in slow motion, we see Elin being pulledpast a 1940s-style poster that reads "Poetry Slam every Friday" as the two make their way through the room. We see the beer swaying in Elin's bottle and Mai turning to Elin every few seconds to make sure she's keeping up and doesn't have to slow down. 
The slow motion transitions into real time. The sounds of the beehive slowly fade away; now you can hear the footsteps of the two women on the ground, the rustling of clothes, and their speech exercises in the background.
While Mai continues talking, Elin takes her phone out of her pocket and looks at the screen. Mai pushes Elin into a toilet cubicle and then closes the door behind her.
3.nurton: Vocal exercises in background (record in while shooting either scene 3 or 4) Talking (2 mins), Do Re Mi + Tongue Twisters

4.notes: Pee sound added in post haha
4.description:
Elin and May talk while vocal exercises happen in the background. May sits down to pee mid conversation. Elin leaned against the wall of the booth and was about to take a sip of her beer when Mai stepped towards her, snatched it from her hand, and took a sip instead. Elin looked at her, amused. They continue to talk, Mai looks for and finds a lipstick in her bag. 

MAI
Do you trust me?
Elin looks directly at her. Her gaze is calm, but steady.
She doesn't break eye contact, a small smile plays on her lips. Mai waits a moment and then takes a
step toward Elin. She opens the lipstick in her hand and comes a little closer. A buzzing sound begins.
It sounds like a mixture of a bee's buzz and a woman's voice. She lifts the lipstick to Elin's lips, who is still too
overwhelmed by the situation to object. The movements slow down, everything now in SLOW MOTION.
The buzzing gradually grows louder. Mai applies the lipstick so carefully, as if she were drawing.
She works with intense concentration. After a few minutes, she tilts her head back slightly to examine the
result. Only now does she seem to notice how close their faces are. Mai is momentarily taken out of
her routine.
She freezes in place and looks at Elin for a second too long before she composes herself.
The humming gets louder.
END OF SLOW MOTION. The humming fades away.

Elin looks at her for a few seconds. Her gaze seems deep and sincere, yet there is a sadness in her eyes.The two look at each other; Elin seems uncertain. Mai is no longer beaming; she appears more serious and distant.
She had already turned her body towards the door. A tense silence fell. The humming started again.

MAI
I think I'll just go for a minute... um...

She pushes her way through the door into the anteroom to the Sink. As the door opens, you can faintly hear the two women taking turns reciting tongue twisters.
Elin stays behind. She pauses briefly, as if in shock.
The humming gets louder and louder, becoming a disorienting, monotonous noise.
She takes a deep breath in and out, leans the back of her head against the wall of the toilet cubicle, and closes her eyes. Her face is tense.
The humming stops with the scene.
4.problems:
- Will be awkward to boom, will likely need apple box in next stall over.
- Heads could be facing down, may be an occasional issue for Boom
4.nurton: Vocal exercises in background (record in while shooting either scene 3 or 4) Talking (2 mins), Do Re Mi + Tongue Twisters

5.description: Alex, a pregnant woman in her mid-thirties, tries to urinate without touching the toilet seat. We don't see her belly yet, only her upper body as she leans against the walls. Her friend Kira stands in front of her, her arms slightly outstretched, ready to rush to Alex's aid if needed. Kira offers Alex help, Alex politely declines and they talk. Kira looks at Alex with a loving gaze. Alex straightens her clothes and freshens up. Now we see her pregnant belly for the first time. The talk about plans, Kira encourages Alex to see how she feels and plan as they go. Alex just snorts softly, and the two of them squeeze out of the cabin one after the other, back intothe action. Muffled voices and laughter can be heard from outside.
5.problems:
- Will be awkward to boom, will likely need apple box in next stall over.
- Heads could be facing down, may be an occasional issue for Boom

6.description:
Assembly.
Two women, dressed entirely in black, squeeze into the booth. Only fabric slicked along the wall is visible. The leather of the bag scrapes against the graffiti-covered wall.
A quick hand, its fingernails painted red, sticks a sticker to the wall of the toilet cubicle. Another hand hastily scribbles its number on the wall.
Among the stickers and doodles, a penis drawn with a ballpoint pen can be seen.
We see the mouths of two teenage girls; one is wearing dark lipstick and lighting a cigarette. The other is chewing gum noisily and blowing a bubble.
A tear-off slip is stuck to the wall. Apartment wanted.
Another hand slowly peels off a sticker. It only comes off partially, leaving traces of adhesive behind.

7.description:
A woman of about 50, Christa, stands in front of a graffiti-covered wall, looking at something we can't see.
She gazes at it questioningly, yet also with interest. Christa wears her blondish-gray hair short, white orthopedic sneakers, and a pearl necklace over her white T-shirt. From outside, we can hear people talking amongst themselves and chairs being moved.
We now see the penis sketched with a ballpoint pen, which she is still staring at. Her phone rings. She answers it and after a short time breaks her fixed gaze. She has a conversation on the Phone.
She makes a few kissing noises into the phone, lowers it, and rummages mischievously in her bag.
The humming stops with the scene.

8.description:
Alex stands in front of the bathroom sink, looking a little tired. Her gray Y2K rhinestone t-shirt no longer looks as glamorous as it did at the beginning of the evening; it's considerably more wrinkled and covered in small water stains. She takes some water and wipes the back of her neck. The door bursts open and Kira comes in. Laughter and applause can be heard from outside. Alex visibly pulls herself together and suddenly seems less flustered. She pretends to have just washed her hands. A soft humming begins.

Kira tries to ask Alex if everything is ok with her. Kira takes a step towards her and looks at her in the mirror. She tilts her head, her expression one of pity. Kira says they can leave whenever Alex wants to go. She gently strokes her shoulder. Alex flinches. The humming grows louder. Alex is annoyed that Kira is babying her. She strides out the door. Kira is briefly taken aback, but then follows Alex out of the room and tries to talk
her through it. Kira calls out to her.

9.description:
Six-year-old Alba and her mother Frieda are standing in line for the toilet cubicles. A small hand in a large one. Alba has a bicycle helmet on her head and is wearing a green princess dress; she shifts impatiently from one foot to the other. She looks up at her mother, who seems slightly tense as she types on her phone. Laughter and voices drift from the corridor into the toilets.
They talk while Frida stares at her phone. Frieda then holds her mobile phone to her ear and waits for someone to answer her call.
Alba fell silent when she saw a group of three women enter the bathroom, all wearing the same garish pink glitter shirt. Sounds of laughter and a mix of voices drifted from outside as the door opened. Alba eyed the women with reserved curiosity. They were in good spirits, talking excitedly at once. One of them wore a cheap plastic crown and a sash that read "Bride to be." 
The group laughs loudly and talks all at once. The group talks with Alba. The Bride kneels down towards little Alba. The friends gaze at each other, completely enraptured. Alba looks up at the women skeptically. Her body seems tense. She glances at Frieda, who is now on the phone. The group continues to talk with Alba. We see little Alba, with the group of women in front of her. The women's voices are now only faintly audible.
Alba's gaze is angry and confused. As she stares at the women, her small hands clench into fists in the tulle of her dress.
9.problems: - Frida OS phone dialogue could cause overlaps.
9.nurton:
- Frida OS phone call (if not recorded in scene)
- Distant laughter and voices from Friends + Bride

10.description:
ALEX is sitting on the toilet and peeing. KIRA is standing opposite her.
She is leaning against the toilet door. A tense silence hangs between them.
They talk.
Silence. They both suddenly look very exhausted. Alex doesn't know what to say. She's about to unroll some toilet paper when she suddenly starts waving her hand wildly and making disgusted noises. Alex shudders. Kira sees the long strand of chewing gum stretching from Alex's hand to the toilet bowl.
Alex stares at her fingers in pain and disgust. Kira pulls a pack of wet wipes from her enormous bag. She takes Alex's hand and cleans it with the wipe, one finger at a time. When she's finished, Alex shudders again.
It's quiet between them again, but this time it's not awkward. Alex, still sitting, looks up at Kira. They both grin briefly.
Alex reaches out her hand to Kira, who holds it briefly. They look at each other. Alex begins to straighten her clothes, gets up. They talk as they leave.
10.nurton: - may need to record last two OS sentences if not recorded in take.

11.description:
You see close-up shots of bees crawling around each other.
Illuminated by the yellowish rays of the sun, sometimes only a bee's leg can be seen, sometimes just a wing.
CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
Bees have always existed. Much longer than humans have.
They've been around since the time of the dinosaurs.
It is difficult to differentiate which body parts belong to which bee or how many are in these shared parts.
"Dance" is involved
11.nurton: Children's voices, although likely done on a seperate occasion.

12.description:
The humming continues. The girl's voice keeps speaking.

CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
They live together in a flock. Like one big family, but made up entirely of sisters.
Some take care of the little bees. Some fly out and look for flowers. Some guard the entrance.
Warm rays of sunlight now stream into the cubicle. We see the screen of a mobile phone, from which a photo has just been sent. As the phone lowers, we see the drawing. The ballpoint pen drawing of a penis has been covered over with a pink marker; in its place now stands an anatomically correct vulva. Lines indicate the names of different parts. The drawing on the cubicle wall is still wet. The woman who drew it quickly disappears from the cubicle.
Christa's mouth corners, a sly smile.

CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
Everyone does their bit to make sure the flock is okay. When it gets cold or danger approaches, they huddle together very tightly. Then they become almost like a single body.
12.nurton: Children's voices, although likely done on a seperate occasion.

13.description:
Warmly lit and in slow motion, we see Alba scream at the top of her lungs. Frieda kneels down beside her.
Alba smiles proudly as she puffs herself up.

CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
Sometimes, however, the hive becomes too cramped. Too many bees. Not enough space.
13.nurton: Children's voices, although likely done on a seperate occasion.

14.description:
Bathed in warm sunlight, Elin's face transforms from sadness to determination. She steps out of the cubicle and sees Mai, who is still washing her hands. In the anteroom, the two women are still practicing their speech exercises, each with a cork in their mouth and a text in their hand. Elin takes a step toward Mai. Mai sees Elin in the mirror and turns to face her.

CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
Then they all fly out at once. The air becomes so full of bees that everything is dark and there's a constant buzzing. Then they have to find a new place.
They stand there for a second. Elin takes another step towards Mai and kisses her, very gently.
As their heads move away from each other again, we see the two women with corks in their mouths looking over, one of them shrugs briefly, then they return to their writing.

CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
A place where they can build a new, larger floor, where there is room for everyone.
When they set off, they don't yet know if they'll make it. Or if such a place even exists. But they set off anyway.
14.nurton: Children's voices, although likely done on a seperate occasion.

15.description:
An elderly woman with long white hair, silver jewelry, and wired headphones is rinsing the toilet when the music seems to grab her. She begins a few dance-like movements, which become increasingly confident. In slow motion, her wrinkled arms float through the air.

CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
Just like that. Perhaps bees know something that humans haven't yet understood.

In the next cubicle, a woman in her mid-twenties comes through the door; she has long blonde hair and is wearing a similar outfit.
She wears a simple top like the old woman; she too slowly begins to bob her head to the music in her AirPods.
We see the two cabins from above. Both women are dancing in their cabins to their music.
With every woman we see, a new humming sound is added.
15.nurton: Children's voices, although likely done on a seperate occasion.

16.description:
Mai and Elin look at each other and grin. Elin is now holding Mai's hand.
END OF SLOW MOTION.

17.description:
The warm light remains. The toilet cubicle is now filled with all the women who were in it tonight. They stand side by side, looking directly at us, with Alba in the middle. We are getting closer and closer to Alba.

CHILDREN'S VOICE (OS)
If I put my ear to the beehive, maybe the bees will whisper it to me.

The light slowly becomes colder again, and Alba now stands alone in the cabin; the other women have disappeared.
She smiles.
The screen goes black.
